I’m launching my YouTube channel!

I received a lot of incredibly positive feedback on my health video on All In, so my team and I decided to start a channel for me to share lessons and insights from my 30+ years in business, investing, and life, and to turn a few of our Deep Dives here into videos to make them more accessible and digestible. Aiming for 1x video a week every Friday.
Here are a few videos we have planned:
- Breakdown of my Groq's investment from the early founding days to $20B deal with NVIDIA
- My best and worst investments
- Electric Grid and Solar explainers
- Humanoid Robotics explainers
To the extent that you’re interested, check out my first video and leave a comment to share what you think and what you would like to see from me.
